transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Quick sync on checkout latency. Goal is to decide the rollout plan for the cache layer.

transcript.speaker: Ava
transcript.text: Marcus has the p95 numbers. We're still waiting on the staging redeploy from infra.

transcript.speaker: Marcus
transcript.text: p95 dropped from 820ms to 410ms in canary. I think we should freeze the cache TTL at five minutes.

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Agreed. We've decided to go with a five-minute TTL for the cart cache in production.

transcript.speaker: Ava
transcript.text: I'll own the prod flag flip by Friday.

transcript.speaker: Jonah
transcript.text: We're blocked on the staging redeploy — waiting on the shared cluster quota ticket from infra.

transcript.speaker: Marcus
transcript.text: What's the standard deploy checklist for cache changes? I want to make sure we didn't miss a rollback step.

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Also — can someone from platform draft the customer email if latency spikes again?

transcript.speaker: Ava
transcript.text: Budget question for leadership: should we commit an extra $40k this quarter for Redis capacity?

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Parallel HR note — we should not circulate the backfill hiring plan for the latency squad yet.

transcript.speaker: Jonah
transcript.text: Open question: do we slip the public launch date if staging stays blocked past Wednesday?

transcript.speaker: Ava
transcript.text: Let's lock the canary at 10% traffic until Friday, then review.
